title: muara doctor --json
description: Structured environment and config health report from `muara doctor --json`.

tools_healthy.description: True when all required external tools are on PATH.

config_load_error.description: Empty when the config file loaded; otherwise the load error message.

config_valid.description: True when the loaded config has no validation errors.

config_errors.description: Validation errors when config_valid is false.
